title: anthemis rigida subsp. runemarkii
intro: Anthemis rigida subsp. runemarkii, also known as Runemark's chamomile or Swedish chamomile, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to calm the nervous system and soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Anthemis rigida subsp. runemarkii include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
